# BP-81 negative variant: separate conditions may read the clock independently.
lang: go
file: BP-81-variant-safe.go
variant: separate-conditions
---
package sample

import "time"

func expired(deadline time.Time) bool {
	if time.Now().After(deadline) {
		return true
	}
	return time.Now().Before(deadline.Add(time.Minute))
}
